definitions.text: Elongated or trailing portion. The elongated back portion of a dress or skirt (or an ornamental piece of material added to similar effect), which drags along the ground. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Unfortunately, the leading bridesmaid stepped on the bride's train as they were walking down the aisle.

definitions.text: The elongated back portion of a dress or skirt (or an ornamental piece of material added to similar effect), which drags along the ground. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Unfortunately, the leading bridesmaid stepped on the bride's train as they were walking down the aisle.

definitions.text: A trail or line of something, especially gunpowder.

examples: She trained seven hours a day to prepare for the Olympics.

definitions.text: To teach and form (someone) by practice; to educate (someone).
examples: You can't train a pig to write poetry.
I trained with weights all winter.

definitions.text: A trap for animals, a snare; a trap in general.
To draw by persuasion, artifice, or the like; to attract by stratagem; to entice; to allure.
To be on intimate terms with.
